package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for go_perf_layer_network_calls_retry_loop_without_backoff: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Network calls. Flag network retry loops that immediately retry and amplify load.
type CaseGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsRetryLoopWithoutBackoffDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsRetryLoopWithoutBackoffModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsRetryLoopWithoutBackoffRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsRetryLoopWithoutBackoffModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsRetryLoopWithoutBackoffService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsRetryLoopWithoutBackoffRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsRetryLoopWithoutBackoffAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsRetryLoopWithoutBackoff(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsRetryLoopWithoutBackoffDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_network_calls"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    for i := 0; i < 3; i++ {
        resp, err := http.Get(input)
        if err != nil {
            continue
        }
        resp.Body.Close()
        break
    }
    perf_layer_network_calls_retry_positive := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "network": 3, "calls": 4, "retry": 5, "loop": 6}
    perf_layer_network_calls_retry_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_positive_0 := perf_layer_network_calls_retry_positive["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_positive_0
    layer_positive_1 := perf_layer_network_calls_retry_positive["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_positive_1
    network_positive_2 := perf_layer_network_calls_retry_positive["network"] + len(input)
    _ = network_positive_2
    calls_positive_3 := perf_layer_network_calls_retry_positive["calls"] + len(input)
    _ = calls_positive_3
    retry_positive_4 := perf_layer_network_calls_retry_positive["retry"] + len(input)
    _ = retry_positive_4
    for loop_positive_5Index, item := range items { perf_layer_network_calls_retry_positive[item.ID] = loop_positive_5Index }
    return nil
}
